note: PUBLIC demo salt. JS must reproduce every manifest_hash.

notes: Trait counts follow the spec's per-layer LISTS, which the Section 7 art budget confirms; several section-header counts are stale (Sky '14' lists 15, Ship Class '14' lists 16, Condition '9' lists 11, Eyes '15' lists 16, Hat '14 + None' lists 13 + None).
rarity_bucket assignments marked 'bucket fixed by spec' come from the Section 4.2 example table; all others are proposals consistent with depth-equals-rarity and are tunable without code changes.
roll_order differs from z_order so that every bias/pairing rule points forward during sequential rolling (ADR-0003).

exclusions.source: spec 3: Diver Helmet excludes ALL mouth items

exclusions.note: Diver Helmet excludes all other hats — trivially enforced: hat is a single-select layer

exclusions.source: spec 3: Ghost body never pairs with Burning condition
spec 3: Fully Underwater only pairs with Abyss, Bioluminescent, or Black Sea
spec 3: Submarine excludes On Bow pose
spec 3: subs don't list — they're either fine or gone
spec 3: The Ark only appears with Storm Swell, Heavy Rain, or Whirlpool

exclusions.note: Halo excludes Horns — trivially enforced by single-select hat layer; the 44 exceptions are 'The Torn' quota below

exclusions.source: spec 3: Blood Moon + Ghost Ship + Skeleton Crew allowed together only in Mythic rolls

pairings.source: spec 3: Diver Helmet pairs beautifully with Scuba/Deep Sea Suit — weight the pairing up
spec 3: Ghost body forces Ghost Fade aura eligibility
spec 3: Ghost body biases toward Ghost Ship
spec 3: Ghost body biases toward Moonlit / Fog
spec 3: Fully Underwater biases Scuba/Deep Sea clothing
spec 3: Rebuilt biases Builder-coded traits — the visual embodiment of the thesis
spec 3: any two wizard traits boost odds of a third (correlated rolls) — wizards feel like a faction, not a coincidence

quotas.name: the_torn
quotas.mechanism: 44 global mint indices in [1, 44400] are pre-committed at commit time, derived from HMAC-SHA256(salt, 'the-torn-slots-v1'). An NFT whose global mint index is in the set has its hat overridden to The Torn. Under The Scuttling (undersell), unminted slots simply never occur, so the realized count can be < 44 — see ADR-0003 and open question OQ-3.
quotas.source: spec 3: Halo+Horns appear together on exactly 44 NFTs ('The Torn')

rules.source: spec 4.1: Mythic = contains >=1 Mythic-bucket trait + forced aura

method.description: per-trait weight = spec 4.2 bucket base weight x global bucket scale, in integer milli-units; None weights hold the design None-shares; scales calibrated analytically then polished through the real roll engine on full-sellout Monte Carlo (see polish_report)
method.tuning_objective: depth-luck-weighted FULL-SELLOUT mixture matches spec 4.1 proportions (interpretation decision OQ-5: 4.1 describes the final collection, which is minted through luck-bearing tiers, not a luck-free pool)

notes: public_mint_budget = cap - treasury_reserve = 44,000. OQ-1 RESOLVED (owner 2026-07-14, option B trim passes): Snorkeler passes 3,000 -> 2,920, removing 80 x E[3] = 240 expected NFTs. Full-sellout expected consumption 44,239 -> 43,999 (<= budget). See ADR-0004.
Under The Scuttling (spec 5.3), all unminted supply is destroyed at mint close; undersell is the expected base case. Runtime still refuses past public_mint_budget (chest-quantity variance).

tiers.name: wizard_of_the_deep
tiers.notes: Not for sale — earned via the lore puzzle / community quest. OQ-2 RESOLVED (2026-07-14): Depth Luck is finite 10.0x (not infinity) so the 44-piece chest stays mixed salvage. See ADR-0004.

notes: OQ-4 RESOLVED (2026-07-14): keep 44 grails total. Spec's 5 Admiral + 12 auction + 27 mid left no slot for the Wizard guaranteed grail; auction pool is 11 (12->11) so Wizard gets 1 named grail without expanding supply or cutting mid-tier 'anyone can strike' odds.
Admiral seeding: each of the 5 grails is independently assigned to one of the 5 Admiral passes at commit time — a chest can hold 0..5 (a genuine lottery, matching 'grail lottery ticket').
Mid-tier seeding: 27 distinct (tier, pass_ordinal) slots drawn without replacement across all 1,255 passes of tiers 4-8 at commit time.
All placements derive from HMAC-SHA256(salt, 'grail-placement-v1') and are covered by the provenance commitment; published at reveal.

tiers.pricing_note: Deep-tier prices revised 2026-07-11 (owner) for a cleaner monotonic effective-cost regression: eff cost/NFT descends 0.100 -> 0.040 across sold tiers. Changed: Shipwright 3.20->3.50 (0.070/NFT), Harbormaster 4.40->5.50 (0.055/NFT), Admiral 5.00->10.00 (0.040/NFT). OQ-1 option B (2026-07-14): Snorkeler passes 3000->2920; full-sellout revenue 3409.90 -> 3389.90 XCH (-20.00). See spec Section 5.2 and ADR-0004.
